ast.name: appendText
ast.source: When Excalibrain is installed, this plugin reads its typed relationship fields (parent, child, friend, opposes, etc.) to draw distinct edge styles and weight connections more accurately.
ast.target: 当安装了Excalibrain时，此插件会读取其类型化关系字段（父级、子级、朋友、对立等），以绘制不同的边样式并更准确地加权连接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many tiers of connections light up when you hover a node. 1 hop highlights only direct connections. 2 hops also highlights connections of connections.
ast.target: 当您悬停在一个节点上时，有多少层连接会亮起。1跳仅高亮直接连接。2跳还会高亮连接的连接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of notes shown around the focus note. The most strongly connected neighbours are shown first.
ast.target: 围绕焦点笔记显示的最大笔记数量。连接最强的邻居会优先显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum radius (px) of the largest neighbour node. Reduce for a compact sidebar; increase for a full-panel view. Default 10 is optimised for a narrow sidebar.
ast.target: 最大邻居节点的最大半径（像素）。减小此值可获得紧凑的侧边栏视图；增大此值可获得全面板视图。默认值10针对窄侧边栏进行了优化。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When hovering a note node, show its vault-relative folder path below the title. Useful for distinguishing notes with similar names.
ast.target: 当悬停在笔记节点上时，在标题下方显示其相对于保险库的文件夹路径。这对于区分名称相似的笔记很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Edges where source or target note has a matching frontmatter field will be styled distinctly and ranked higher.
ast.target: 源笔记或目标笔记具有匹配的frontmatter字段的边将被独特地样式化并排名更高。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Read Excalibrain relationship fields to type edges and boost connection strength.
ast.target: 读取Excalibrain关系字段以对边进行分类并增强连接强度。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在工具提示中显示路径

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Import colour groups from Obsidian's built-in graph view
ast.target: 从Obsidian内置的图谱视图导入颜色分组

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No graph.json found. Open Obsidian's graph view and configure colour groups first.
ast.target: 未找到graph.json。请先打开Obsidian的图谱视图并配置颜色分组。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No colour groups found in Obsidian's graph view settings.
ast.target: 在Obsidian的图谱视图设置中未找到颜色分组。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read graph view settings.
ast.target: 读取图谱视图设置失败。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Scales node size by how strongly connected a neighbour is. More shared tags and links = bigger node. 0 = all same size. 10 = maximum variation.
ast.target: 根据邻居的连接强度缩放节点大小。共享的标签和链接越多，节点越大。0 = 所有节点大小相同。10 = 最大变化。

ast.name: aria-label
ast.source: Maximum radius of the largest neighbour node in pixels. Reduce for a compact sidebar view; increase for a full-panel view.
ast.target: 最大邻居节点的最大半径（像素）。减小此值可获得紧凑的侧边栏视图；增大此值可获得全面板视图。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Colour groups, tooltip options, and Excalibrain integration are in plugin settings.
ast.target: 颜色组、工具提示选项和 Excalibrain 集成位于插件设置中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Assign colours to notes by query. Supported: "path:folder/", "tag:#name", or plain text matching note title. First matching rule wins.
ast.target: 通过查询为笔记分配颜色。支持：\"path:folder/\"、\"tag:#name\" 或纯文本匹配笔记标题。第一个匹配的规则生效。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 从 Obsidian 图谱视图导入

ast.name: text
ast.target: Excalibrain 已安装 — 使用默认字段

ast.name: text
ast.source: Excalibrain hasn't been opened yet so it has no saved configuration. This plugin is currently using Excalibrain's built-in English field names (Parent, Children, Friends, etc.). Open Excalibrain to generate its config and customise which fields map to which relationship types.
ast.target: Excalibrain 尚未打开，因此没有保存的配置。此插件当前使用 Excalibrain 的内置英文字段名称（Parent、Children、Friends 等）。请打开 Excalibrain 以生成其配置并自定义哪些字段映射到哪些关系类型。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Relationship fields from your Excalibrain configuration are active. Edges typed as parent/child draw as solid lines, friends as dashed, opposes as dotted, previous/next as dash-dot. Typed links also receive a strength bonus so they rank higher in the neighbourhood.
ast.target: 来自您的 Excalibrain 配置的关系字段已激活。类型为 parent/child 的边绘制为实线，friends 为虚线，opposes 为点线，previous/next 为点划线。类型化链接还会获得强度加成，因此在邻域中排名更高。
